children.text: the Global Fragility Strategy required under , including each of the country plans developed under , is implemented, updated, and coordinated on a regular basis; andsection 9803 of this titlesection 9805 of this title

the strategy is used to guide United States Government policy at a senior level and incorporated into relevant strategies and plans across the United States Government such that the activities of all relevant Federal departments and agencies are consistent with the strategy.
